Description: Use max-w-* classes for content containers with centered alignment
Write CSS for mobile first then use md: lg: breakpoints for larger screens
Use CSS Grid for 2D layouts and Flexbox for 1D alignment
All buttons need hover active focus and disabled states
Add subtle hover effects to indicate interactivity
Don't: no hover effect on clickable cards

Description: Show validation states with color icons and messages
Show loading spinners or skeleton screens during data fetch
Do: Skeleton component or spinner with aria-busy=true

Description: Design meaningful empty states with illustrations and CTAs
Don't: blank page or just No data text

Description: Use proper HTML elements for their intended purpose
Do: nav main article section aside footer

Description: Ensure all interactive elements show visible focus indicator
Provide descriptive alt text for meaningful images
Don't: alt=image or empty alt for content images

Description: Maintain 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text
Don't: rely on color alone for information

Description: Use loading=lazy for below-fold images
Use WebP format with fallbacks and proper sizing
Use transform and opacity for animations
Use system font stack or load web fonts properly
Do: font-sans or Google Fonts with display=swap

Description: Use fluid typography with clamp() or responsive classes
Use Tailwind spacing scale consistently
Don't: random values like p-[17px] or m-[23px]

Description: Add adequate whitespace between sections
Use 150-300ms for UI transitions
